mano_cua.result_summary: 前置图标大部分正常但有样式异常：(1)有序列表从0.开始而非1.；(2)任务列表未选中圆圈○比选中✓略大，尺寸不一致；(3)不同级别标题均显示H₁图标，未反映实际heading level。对齐、颜色、block hover图标均正常
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Front icons mostly functional and correctly styled, but visual anomalies found: (1) Ordered list starts at '0.' instead of '1.'; (2) Task list unchecked circles appear slightly larger than checked circles; (3) Multiple heading levels all show H₁ label; (4) All inline icons properly left-aligned; (5) Colors appropriate; (6) Block-level hover icons correct.
